subject: A massive humanoid golem assembled from moss-covered hewn stone blocks, animated by green magical energy glowing at its joints and core, standing in a forest clearing
description: A towering stone golem stands in a forested clearing, its body composed of stacked rectangular blocks of weathered grey stone draped with moss and lichen. Glowing green-yellow magical light pulses from gaps between the stones, especially around its chest and joints, suggesting the construct is held together and animated by ambient nature magic rather than mechanical assembly. Its silhouette is broad-shouldered and hulking, with thick limbs and a small blocky head. The figure is centered and faces forward, looming over the viewer. Behind it, soft-focus trees and underbrush in muted greens and browns frame the scene. Lighting is ambient daylight filtered through the forest canopy.
foreground: stone golem of stacked moss-covered blocks with glowing green energy at the seams
background: soft-focus forest clearing with trees and undergrowth
